input_fields.label: Product / Service
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. AI-powered CRM for B2B SaaS startups
input_fields.hint: Describe what you sell in one or two sentences. Be specific.

input_fields.label: Target Audience
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. VP of Sales at Series A SaaS companies with 20-100 employees
input_fields.hint: Who is the ideal recipient? Include title, company type, and size if possible.

input_fields.label: Pain Points
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. They spend too much time manually updating CRM data; deals fall through because follow-ups are missed.
input_fields.hint: List 1-3 real problems your prospect likely faces. Be honest and specific.

input_fields.label: Your Offer / CTA
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Free 15-min demo to show how we cut CRM data entry by 80%
input_fields.hint: What is the ONE action you want them to take? Keep it low-commitment.

input_fields.label: Your Role / Company
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Head of Growth at Nexus AI

input_fields.label: Prospect First Name (Optional)
input_fields.hint: Leave blank to use [First Name] as a placeholder.

input_fields.label: Prospect Company (Optional)
input_fields.hint: Used for personalization. Leave blank for a generic version.

input_fields.label: Personalization Hook (Optional)
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. I saw you recently posted about scaling your sales team on LinkedIn. / Congrats on your Series B round!
input_fields.hint: A recent event, post, or achievement you noticed. This dramatically increases reply rates.

options.label: Friendly and Professional - warm but credible (recommended)
Direct and Confident - straight to the point, no fluff
Curious and Consultative - question-led, low pressure
Casual Peer - like a message from a founder to another founder

input_fields.label: What Do You Want to Generate?
